intended_use: Hi-D Imaging 4TAVR is a software as a medical device (SaMD) intended to support trained healthcare professionals (cardiologists, radiologists, clinical specialists) with the assessment of the cardiova
intended_use_full: Hi-D Imaging 4TAVR is a software as a medical device (SaMD) intended to support trained healthcare professionals (cardiologists, radiologists, clinical specialists) with the assessment of the cardiovascular anatomy and visualization and measurement of structures of the heart and vessels, including the aortic valve, and with pre-operational planning and sizing for transcatheter aortic valve replacement (TAVR) procedures
target_condition: Tricuspid aortic stenosis in patients eligible for TAVR
ground_truth: Manually performed measurements by expert readers using commercially available FDA-cleared and CE-marked software including the predicate device (3mensio Workstation)
other_metrics: Reproducibility: 99.99% identical pixels for segmented volumes; 100% reproducibility for report measurements; Usability: 0% use error and 98% of scenarios passed without difficulty
